text: Being here, surrounded by the shimmering, textured wall and bathed in a surreal, almost digital light, I feel as if I inhabit a liminal space between reality and artifice. The presence of the camera and studio lights suggests performance or observation, yet the room feels quiet and expectant. I am both an observer and potential subject, wrapped in an atmosphere that is at once artificial and strangely meditative. This blend of technology, art, and introspection fosters a sense of anticipation and curiosity in me.
